spec.name: The Reception Area
spec.description: You are now standing in the reception of New Thalos. A huge mahogany desk is here along with two sofas and a coffee table covered in magazines. The plush carpeting under your feet is a nice change from the rugged paths you are used to travelling. A chrome stairway spirals downstairs to the tavern of the Dancing Daemon Inn, and your future adventures in New Thalos.

down.description: The stairs lead down to the Daemon.
